report.title: # Slice 065 - hash shape capability gap to story lane
report.guardrail: The lane promotes the capability-gap next story into story authority and starts the nested semantic-capability run through CLI. Hash validation behavior remains unpromoted until SOG execution and promotion evidence exist.

candidateStrategy.sourceStory:
# hash.shape.validate.v1 semantic capability story

As a Defracto semantic runtime designer,
I want hash.shape.validate.v1 to validate sha256:<64 lowercase hex> strings,
so that evidence SDK capabilities can validate hash fields without host-language product logic.

## Conveyor Order

1. Compose hash.shape.validate.v1 from existing SEJ language operations.
2. If missing generic language operations are found, emit a language capability gap.
3. If resolver evolution is required, request only tiny universal operations.
4. Never add hash product logic to the resolver.

strategyPlan.strategyIntent: promote the Slice 057 capability-gap next story into story authority and start the nested semantic-capability run through the CLI

sourceStory.text:
# hash.shape.validate.v1 semantic capability story

As a Defracto semantic runtime designer,
I want hash.shape.validate.v1 to validate sha256:<64 lowercase hex> strings,
so that evidence SDK capabilities can validate hash fields without host-language product logic.

## Conveyor Order

1. Compose hash.shape.validate.v1 from existing SEJ language operations.
2. If missing generic language operations are found, emit a language capability gap.
3. If resolver evolution is required, request only tiny universal operations.
4. Never add hash product logic to the resolver.

acceptedClaims: Slice 057 produced an exact capability-gap receipt for hash.shape.validate.v1
The emitted next story is accepted as the semantic-capability run story source
The semantic-capability run may start through CLI bootstrap
Hash behavior remains unpromoted until SOG execution and parity evidence exist

promotionBar: capability-gap receipt exists before story promotion
story source is hash-bound to Slice 057 nextConveyorStory
provider fallback is receipted and candidate-only
story hardening promotes only the next story source
nested semantic-capability run starts through CLI bootstrap
no hash behavior product truth is accepted in this lane
forbiddenClaims: hash.shape.validate.v1 executable behavior is promoted by this lane
provider candidate grants authority without hardening

traceQuestions.whichSogOwnsBehavior: Future hash.shape.validate.v1 behavior remains blocked until a semantic operation graph executes and promotes it.

strategyPlan.completionPosture: The capability-gap story is promoted as story authority for a nested semantic-capability run; hash validation behavior remains unpromoted.

Promoted strategy/story authority for the capability-gap-to-story lane.

Prove next story hardening into story authority.
Prove strategy materialization through the reusable SOG.

artifactManifest.completionPosture: This manifest bounds the story-hardening lane and future semantic-capability run targets; it does not materialize executable hash behavior.

storyImplement.completionPosture: Ready to promote the hash.shape.validate.v1 next story as story authority for a nested semantic-capability run.

completionPosture: This manifest supplies concrete run values to the reusable semantic strategy materializer and keeps hash.shape.validate.v1 behavior as future semantic-capability work.
